chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6620 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing on CMA No.28351/2021 2. For hearing of main case 24.02.2025 Mr. Ali Almani, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Salman Khan advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Nadeem Qureshi, advocate for respondent Qazi Abdul Haleem Siddiqui, Deputy Attorney General Mr. Darvesh K. Mandhan advocate files Vakalatnama of Syed Irshad-ur- Rehman, advocate for respondent which is taken on record. Learned counsel for respondents No.3 & 4 states that the demand notice impugned herein is being withdrawn forthwith. In view of such material representation learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petition appears to have served its purpose and may be disposed off. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
